ai.notes: The form uses a Lever-specific structure where custom questions are embedded in a JSON-like hidden input and rendered dynamically. The hCaptcha is present.

fields.question: Resume/CV
Full name
Email
Phone
Current location
Current company
LinkedIn URL
Naukri URL
Other website

By submitting my application I acknowledge and consent to the data privacy policies of the Westernacher Group. I am particularly aware about the exchange of my information within the Westernacher Group, as well as that my data could be transferred to third countries. I understand that my application data may be stored for up to 24 months for statutory and recruitment-related purposes. https://westernacher.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/Data-Protection-Information.pdf
I give Westernacher Consulting my consent to collect and process video and audio material of me for recruitment purposes.
I give Westernacher Consulting my consent to collect and process my personal ID information for recruitment purposes.
I give Westernacher Consulting my consent to collect and process my employment and payroll data for recruitment purposes.
I agree to be considered for other positions.
Have you been previously employed with Westernacher Consulting?
Mention your total work experience in years:
How many years of relevant work experience do you have for this requirement?
Mention name of your current employer/ payroll company:
Current location:
Have you worked on international assignments, onsite?
If worked on international assignments, please mention the regions and duration.
If selected, in how many days can you join?
What is your current CTC?
What is your expected CTC?
Have you been associate with Westernacher before ?
